Motion To Strike Portions Of The Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-30-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT ADA MORALES, LAWRENCE MORALES Motion To Strike Portions Of The Complaint is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to paragraph 18. Non-opposition filed. Motion is otherwise denied. Allegations in the complaint are sufficient to support the claims subject to this motion. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
